critical_findings.failure_mode: [S1] Budget warning path may downgrade deny outcomes in reviewed slice output.
critical_findings.impact: Creates a fail-open governance risk where hard deny outcomes can be softened to require_review.
critical_findings.minimal_fix: Preserve deny/system_response outputs when preexisting deny is true; only escalate healthy states.

critical_findings.failure_mode: [S2] Builder updates objective observed_value without recomputing aggregate budget status fields.
critical_findings.impact: Budget-aware chaos tests can miss warning/exhausted/invalid branches.

critical_findings.failure_mode: [S2] CI gate lacks direct tests for warning/exhausted/invalid budget states.
critical_findings.impact: Regressions in gate behavior can pass unnoticed.
critical_findings.minimal_fix: Add explicit gate tests for warning, exhausted, and invalid states.

required_fixes.description: Prevent warning-state override from weakening deny decisions in evaluation control.
Recompute aggregate budget fields in replay builder after objective edits.
Add CI gate tests covering warning/exhausted/invalid budget paths.

watch_items: Track schema constraints linking decision and system_response to prevent drift.
failure_mode_summary: Targeted budget-control review passed core architecture but identified fail-open and coverage defects requiring remediation.
